sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Restricted stock dispositions reported for MGNI insider (MGNI)
feed.summary: An insider at Magnite, Inc. (MGNI), David Buonaser, reported multiple dispositions of restricted common stock through Form 144 filings in June 2026. The sales occurred on June 1st, 15th, 16th, and 17th, with the largest single disposition being 11,233 shares for $202,194 on June 16th. These transactions involved restricted stock acquired from the issuer, and while dollar amounts are provided, the Form 144 does not confirm cash flow treatment or if the sales were part of a trading plan.

feed.title: Milestone Scientific expects Q2 revenue of ~$2.8M, up 21% YoY
authors: Naman S ScanX News Team or NULL
feed.summary: Milestone Scientific Inc. anticipates a 21% year-over-year increase in preliminary unaudited Q2 2026 revenue, reaching approximately $2.8 million. This growth is primarily driven by a 300% surge in its medical segment and successful expansion into international markets. The company also reported progress in reimbursement claims, including its first successful workers' compensation claim, and plans to release full financial results in August 2026.

feed.title: Macy's (M) director awarded 1,322 phantom stock units tied to common shares
feed.summary: Macy's, Inc. director MARKEE RICHARD L was granted 1,322 Phantom Stock Units, which are tied to Macy's common stock and will convert on a 1-for-1 basis into common shares upon his departure from the Board. This grant, valued at an average of $20.8064 per unit, represents equity-based compensation rather than an open-market transaction. The units will be settled in stock when the director terminates from the Board of Directors, aligning his long-term incentives with shareholder value.

feed.title: Marcus Theatres records highest June revenue ever
feed.summary: Marcus Theatres achieved its highest June revenue ever, driven by the strong performance of "Toy Story 5" and a robust film slate including "Scary Movie" and "Disclosure Day." The company also reported record concession sales, per-person spending, and its highest June box office since 2019. Anticipating continued success, Marcus Theatres looks forward to upcoming releases like "Minions & Monsters" and "Dune: Part Three."

feed.title: [Form 4] MARCHEX INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Marchex, Inc. reported that Vice Chairman Michael A. Arends acquired $4,144,144 in 6.0% convertible debt due 2028 from the company. This acquisition is tied to Marchex's purchase of Archenia, Inc., where the notes are convertible into Class B common stock and include an earn-out provision for additional shares based on Archenia's performance. The transaction links insider consideration to the acquired business's future financial and operational targets.

feed.title: Lexeo Therapeutics (LXEO) COO reports stock award and small tax-related sale
feed.summary: Lexeo Therapeutics' Chief Operating Officer, Jose Manuel Otero, reported receiving a stock grant of 12,060 shares on June 29 and subsequently selling 4,666 shares on July 1 to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of performance Restricted Stock Units (RSUs). After these transactions, Otero directly holds 137,482 shares, including 100,621 RSUs, indicating the sale was a minor portion of his total holdings. The sale was executed at a weighted average price of $4.48 per share.

feed.title: Rule 10b5-1 sale: Lightbridge (LTBR) director disposes 1,116 shares
feed.summary: Lightbridge Corp (LTBR) director Sherri Goodman sold 1,116 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $9.29 per share, as reported in a Form 4 filing. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on March 20, 2026. Following the sale, Goodman directly retains 60,246 shares, indicating the disposition represents a small portion of her total holdings.

feed.title: Viatris Inc. stock rises Wednesday, outperforms market
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. (VTRS) stock rose 1.89% on Wednesday to $16.18, outperforming the broader market which saw the S&P 500 Index fall 0.22% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average fall 0.03%. This rise broke a two-day losing streak for the company's stock.

feed.title: Tatun Tractor Supply Company store to host Deer and wildlife event
feed.summary: The Tatum Tractor Supply Company store is hosting a Deer and Wildlife event on July 18, 2026, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. The event will offer activities such as pet adoption, deer feed education, processing training, and deer plot planting education. It is open to the public and aims to cater to hunting enthusiasts by providing guidance on managing feed plots, herds, and hunter safety.

feed.title: MHO - MI Homes Inc Volatility & Greeks
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of MI Homes Inc. (MHO) stock, including its latest closing price, financial metrics, valuation ratios, and performance indicators. It covers key data points such as market cap, earnings per share, sales figures, insider and institutional ownership, and various volatility and liquidity measures. The report also highlights past performance over different timeframes and analyst recommendations.

feed.title: Is Magnite’s (MGNI) In‑Flight Ad Push Quietly Redefining Its Omnichannel Growth Story?
feed.summary: Magnite (MGNI) was recently added to several Russell value benchmarks and announced a partnership with Viasat Aviation to bring programmatic advertising to in-flight Wi-Fi, expanding its omnichannel reach. This move supports Magnite's CTV and video-led narrative by adding a high-attention ad channel, potentially redefining its growth story. However, the company still faces risks related to customer concentration and infrastructure costs, and investors need to consider these factors alongside the new opportunities.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Renews MLB Partnership, Is The Growth Already Priced In?
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International (MGM) has renewed its partnership with Major League Baseball, strengthening its position as the league's exclusive integrated resort and casino partner. Despite soft short-term momentum, the company has seen significant gains over the past 90 days and a year. Valuation models present conflicting views, with one narrative suggesting the stock is overvalued at $47.52 compared to a fair value of $27.97, while another discounted cash flow model indicates it is undervalued relative to a future cash flow value of $64.13.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial (RJF) In Focus On Index Change With Valuation Still In View
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) is drawing investor attention due to its removal from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, an upcoming US$0.54 per share dividend, and a recent analyst price target increase. Despite a modest year-to-date decline, the stock has shown strong longer-term performance with a 5-year total shareholder return of 94.96%. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests RJF is currently undervalued at $158.19, with a fair value estimate of $174.42, driven by strong loan growth and potential increases in net interest income.

feed.title: Eastman Kodak files prospectus for 4.426M common shares
feed.summary: Eastman Kodak has filed a prospectus with the SEC for the offering of 4.426 million common shares. These shares are being sold by existing shareholders, meaning Eastman Kodak itself will not receive any proceeds from this sale. The filing provides transparent details about the offering for potential investors.

feed.title: Kilroy Realty schedules July 28 call after Q2 results on July 27
feed.summary: Kilroy Realty Corporation (KRC) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Monday, July 27, 2026. The company will then host a conference call to discuss these results on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. Registration details for participation and a link to the live internet broadcast and replay are available through the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: IMS Group to Appoint John M. Caccia as Chairman and Partner
feed.summary: IMS Group and its investment management division, IMS Capital Management (IMS CM), announced the appointment of John M. Caccia, Esq. as Chairman, effective July 1, 2026. Mr. Caccia, formerly a senior partner at Skadden, will work from IMS Group's New York office and focus on expanding global activities and capital management, particularly in private equity, private credit, and digital assets. The move is expected to strengthen IMS Group's reach in U.S. markets and leverage its tech, venture, and AI advantages for its transaction pipeline.

feed.title: Maxim Group Maintains Moleculin Biotech(MBRX.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $10
feed.summary: Maxim Group has reiterated its Buy rating for Moleculin Biotech (MBRX.US) and maintained its target price at $10. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding the company's stock performance.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Draws Fresh Attention Following Index Adds And AI Push
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) has gained investor attention due to its inclusion in three Russell 1000 defensive indices, new AI-focused product updates, and an expanded cloud data partnership. Despite a recent share price decline, the company has shown significant returns over the past year, with a narrative suggesting it is 8.9% undervalued driven by AI and hybrid cloud demand. However, potential risks like increased component costs or pricing pressure from hyperscaler partnerships could challenge this optimistic outlook.

feed.title: J.Jill (NYSE: JILL) CFO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax bill
feed.summary: J.Jill's CFO, Mark W. Webb, had 3,493.58 shares of common stock withheld on June 30, 2026, to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of previously granted Restricted Stock Units (RSUs). This transaction, valued at $15.97 per share, is a routine tax-withholding event and not an open-market sale. Following this, Webb directly holds 176,378.60 shares of J.Jill common stock.

feed.title: Form 4 J Jill Inc For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 4 filing for J Jill Inc for July 1st. Form 4 filings are statements filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) by company insiders (officers, directors, or beneficial owners of more than 10% of a company's stock) to report changes in their ownership of the company's securities. The article does not provide specific details from the filing but notes the stock symbol JILL.

feed.title: Janus Henderson rating cut to BB by S&P on buyout completion
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings has downgraded Janus Henderson Group PLC to BB from BBB+ following its take-private acquisition by Trian Fund Management L.P. and General Catalyst Group Management LLC. The downgrade reflects the merger into Jupiter Co. Ltd., the subordination of Janus Henderson's senior unsecured notes to new secured debt, and the expected leverage of 3.0x-4.0x for Jupiter. S&P highlighted that the ratings could be further lowered if leverage exceeds 5.0x or if the business deteriorates.

feed.title: JCTC (JCTC) major holders add 17,783 shares in open‑market buys
feed.summary: Ten percent owners of Jewett Cameron Trading Co Ltd (JCTC), Melinda Bradley and Adam Bradley, increased their holdings by 17,783 shares through open-market purchases between June 26 and June 30, 2026. These transactions, valued at $42,290, were carried out at prices ranging from $2.21 to $2.38 per share via an individual retirement account and AJB Investment Fund II, LP. Following these buys, AJB Investment Fund II, LP holds 371,007 shares and the IRA holds 358,507 shares indirectly attributed to the reporting persons.

feed.title: Ghaffarian details 19.7% Intuitive Machines (LUNR) stake and recent sales
feed.summary: Kamal Seyed Ghaffarian has filed an amended Schedule 13D for Intuitive Machines, Inc. (LUNR), revealing a beneficial ownership of 19.7% of the company's Class A Common Stock, totaling 38,429,036 shares. This includes holdings through Ghaffarian Enterprises, LLC and GM Enterprises, LLC. The filing also notes that Ghaffarian Enterprises, LLC recently sold 709,545 Class A shares in open-market transactions over the past 60 days under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: Ghaffarian entities trim Intuitive Machines (LUNR) stake via 141,909-share sale
feed.summary: Entities associated with Dr. Kamal Ghaffarian sold 141,909 shares of Intuitive Machines (LUNR) Class A Common Stock on June 29, 2026, for approximately $20-21 per share. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan and involved corresponding conversions of Common Units and Class C Common Stock into Class A shares, with Class C shares subsequently cancelled. The transactions represent a modest reduction in Dr. Ghaffarian's overall holdings, with significant indirect ownership remaining.

feed.title: Inogen Announces the Appointment of Andy Reding as Chief Operating Officer
feed.summary: Inogen, Inc. has announced the appointment of Andy Reding as Chief Operating Officer, a newly created role effective July 6, 2026. Reding will be responsible for driving revenue, operational performance, and aligning strategic priorities to enhance execution and accelerate the company's growth. With over 30 years of leadership experience in medical technology, including significant respiratory care expertise, Reding is expected to be instrumental in Inogen's diversification and expansion efforts.

feed.title: [Form 4] MDU RESOURCES GROUP INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: MDU Resources Group Inc. director Marian M. Durkin reported acquiring 152 shares of common stock at a price of $0.0000 per share as part of a stock-based compensation award. This grant was an election under the issuer's director compensation policy to receive common stock instead of cash compensation for board service, increasing her direct holdings to 11,676 common shares. The transaction is compensation-related and not an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: BLK Stock Gains After-Hours — US Treasury To Offer Two BlackRock ETFs As Options In Trump Accounts
feed.summary: BlackRock's stock gained after-hours following the U.S. Treasury's selection of two of its iShares ETFs, IVV and ITOT, as core investment options for the new "Trump Accounts" early-wealth program. These ETFs, known for their low 0.03% expense ratios, aim to make long-term wealth building accessible for American families. BlackRock is also supporting the initiative with philanthropic grants and matching contributions for its own employees.

feed.title: Sprout Social, Workday, and Manhattan Associates Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Sprout Social, Workday, and Manhattan Associates saw significant jumps after Guggenheim analyst John DiFucci upgraded Salesforce and ServiceNow to Buy, citing overly pessimistic valuations in the software sector due to AI disruption fears. This analyst upgrade, focused on valuation rather than AI benefits, signaled to the market that the "SaaSpocalypse" repricing had overshot, inviting bargain hunting. Workday's shares have been particularly volatile, experiencing a previous upgrade five days prior and currently trading significantly below its 52-week high despite its strong margin profile and cash flow.

feed.title: Oneok Inc. (OKE) Suffers a Larger Drop Than the General Market: Key Insights
feed.summary: Oneok Inc. (OKE) experienced a larger-than-market drop in a recent trading session, closing down 1.39% compared to smaller losses for major indices. Despite this, the natural gas company's shares had outperformed the Oils-Energy sector and S&P 500 over the past month. Analysts project a rise in EPS and revenue for Oneok's upcoming earnings report, with the company currently holding a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and trading at a premium valuation compared to its industry.

feed.title: Kratos Defense (KTOS) exec sells 7,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions executive Steven S. Fendley sold 7,000 shares of common stock on June 29, 2026, for a weighted average price of $48.3652 per share. This transaction, totaling approximately $338,556, was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in May 2025. After the sale, Fendley directly holds 302,126 shares, including those in his 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Evergy, Inc. Secures $2.2 Billion Revolving Credit Facility: Key Terms, Definitions, and Loan Agreement Highlights
feed.summary: Evergy, Inc. has secured a new revolving credit facility totaling $2.2 billion, providing significant financial flexibility for general corporate purposes, including working capital and capital expenditures. This agreement, filed as an 8-K report by Geoffrey T. Ley, outlines the facility's structure, interest rates tied to credit ratings, and key covenants. The move is expected to enhance Evergy's liquidity and financial strength, potentially supporting share price stability.

feed.title: Is Fastenal’s Extended Credit Maturity and Funding Shift Recasting Its Capital Allocation Playbook (FAST)?
feed.summary: Fastenal Company has extended its unsecured revolving credit agreement providing US$835 million with an accordion feature up to US$500 million, potentially extending maturity to June 2033. Concurrently, it revised its Master Note Agreement, reducing private placement capacity to US$600 million but extending its issuance window to 2031, indicating a strategic shift in funding and long-term financial flexibility. These actions enhance liquidity visibility and provide more optionality for funding distribution investments, like the new Carrollton, Georgia logistics hub, to support revenue and earnings resilience.

feed.title: Airbnb (NASDAQ: ABNB) director sells shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Airbnb director Kenneth I. Chenault exercised stock options and simultaneously sold 8,346 shares of Class A Common Stock at $150.00 per share on June 29, 2026. These transactions were carried out under a pre-scheduled Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in August 2025. Following the sale, Mr. Chenault directly holds 40,879 shares of Airbnb Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband (LBRD.K) Is Up 6.5% After Russell Index Removal Reshapes Its Investor Base
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband's (LBRD.A and LBRD.K) shares rose 6.5% after their removal from several Russell growth indices on June 27, 2026. This index removal could prompt mechanical selling by index-tracking funds, reshaping the company's trading liquidity and investor base. This change highlights the importance of the ongoing Charter Communications acquisition and the company's recent US$2,676 million net loss in 2025 as more relevant influences on its investment narrative.

feed.title: Haleon tops FTSE 100 as buyback cuts voting shares ahead of H1 earnings
feed.summary: Haleon (LON:HLN) has seen its voting shares reduced by 4.6% since 2022 due to a significant share buyback program. The company has completed approximately 91% of its £500 million buyback before its first-half results are released on July 30, helping to boost its stock even as the FTSE 100 declined. Additionally, Haleon announced a five-year deal with Microsoft to enhance productivity through AI, data, and cloud capabilities.

This transaction increased his direct holdings to 178,764 shares, with an additional 40,555 share units held indirectly through a trust. The acquisition is noted as a routine, compensation-related award rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: SK AX partners with Korea Electric Power Engineering & Construction on AX in power and energy industry
feed.summary: SK AX has signed a memorandum of understanding with Korea Electric Power Engineering & Construction (KEPCO E&C) to collaborate on AI transformation (AX) within the power generation and energy sector. This partnership aims to integrate AX into various functions, from back-office operations to core areas like power plant design and operations, utilizing SK AX’s platforms such as AXgenticWire AiPMO. Both companies emphasize the growing demand for AI innovation to address future energy challenges, including small modular reactors and renewable energy.

A $1,000 investment in PWR stock 15 years ago would now be worth $33,514.30. This demonstrates the impact of compounded returns on investment growth over time.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (BR) saw its stock advance by 2.91% to $140.93 on Wednesday, marking its second consecutive day of gains. Despite this rise, the stock underperformed against the broader market indices, as both the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced slight declines on an otherwise poor trading day for the stock market.

feed.title: Cboe Asking SEC to Approve Earnings-Based Event Contracts
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets is seeking SEC approval for new derivatives called "binary KPI options," which are event contracts based on specific company earnings metrics rather than stock prices. These options would function similarly to yes/no prediction market contracts, allowing traders to bet on whether a company will meet or exceed certain financial or operational targets. If approved, these derivatives could offer a new avenue for institutional traders and distinguish Cboe in the prediction market space, which is typically regulated by the CFTC.

feed.title: Mantle Ridge LP Reduces Stake in Dollar Tree Inc: A Strategic Portfolio Adjustment
feed.summary: Mantle Ridge LP significantly reduced its stake in Dollar Tree Inc by selling over 11 million shares at $119.35 each, representing a -107.09% impact on its portfolio. This strategic move suggests a reevaluation of the investment firm's focus, despite Dollar Tree's strong market position, financial metrics indicating it's modestly undervalued, and promising growth indicators. The transaction positions Mantle Ridge for potential diversification or reallocation of resources to other opportunities.

feed.title: American Water Works Company (AWK) Seeks Rate Increase in Missouri
feed.summary: American Water Works Company, through its subsidiary Missouri-American Water, has filed a request for new water and wastewater rates with the Missouri Public Service Commission. This request aims for approximately $179 million in annualized incremental revenue, driven by $1.6 billion in capital investments planned between June 2025 and May 2028. The company expects the new rates to be effective by June 2027, reflecting its commitment to infrastructure improvements and financial stability.

feed.title: Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) 8-K Filing: Investor Materials Update & Key SEC Details July 2026
feed.summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) filed an 8-K on July 1, 2026, to announce that updated investor materials will be posted on its Investor Relations website. This disclosure, made under Regulation FD, signals the availability of potentially new strategic, financial, or operational information, though the filing itself does not contain immediate material developments. Investors are encouraged to review these forthcoming materials for updates that could influence PSEG's valuation.
